Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 76 

CVRD_DAYS_IP_PSYCH_OVER_65 

LABEL: Count of Medicaid Covered Days in an Inpatient Psychiatric Facility (IPF); Beneficiary Over 65 Years 

DESCRIPTION: The number of inpatient psychiatric days covered by Medicaid on this claim. 

SHORT NAME: CVRD_DAYS_IP_PSYCH_OVER_65 

LONG NAME: CVRD_DAYS_IP_PSYCH_OVER_65 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims
